heading_content_part: does not collect any kind of user information. In all our apps and games, we are using third-party SDKs which may collect some information.

Ad serving.  Our partners may use ad serving technology to provide advertisements of interest to you within the Services (for example within the Android application). In this connection our partners may collect and use information about you, such as your Service session activity, device identifier, MAC address, IMEI, coarse geo-location information and IP address. Please note that our partners operate under their own privacy policies.For more information, see:https://www.google.com/adsense/localized-terms

Cookies and other identifiers.Your Style does not use cookies in apps or games .Our partners may use cookies and other identifiers (such as clear gifs or pixel tags). With cookies and other identifiers our partners can provide a better user experience. You may delete the cookies from your device after using our Services.

External linksOur Services may contain links to external sites, such as Youtube or Google Play and link content from external third party sources. Please note that the use of such third party sites or content is subject to the privacy policies and usage terms of the third party in question instead of our own terms and we do not have control or assume any liability over such content.
